notes: Universal Soldier (SNES) is an unreleased port of Turrican II developed by The Code Monkeys. The available source (TCRF) contains only metadata about the game's development status, unused music tracks, and its relationship to the Turrican series. No visual design documentation, gameplay footage analysis, or world-state communication mechanics are described in the source material. The game was never completed or publicly released, making empirical extraction of visual communication patterns impossible from available documentation. To properly extract manifestation patterns for the Two Fires engine, sources documenting: (1) in-game screenshots or visual assets, (2) level design and environmental layouts, (3) enemy/NPC appearance and behavior documentation, (4) HUD and UI design, or (5) developer design documents would be required.
